title: Speaking AI Prompts - C1 Advanced
description: Prompts para evaluar y mejorar el Speaking al estilo Cambridge C1 Advanced usando inteligencia artificial.

types.title: Part 1 – Interview
types.description: Evaluate an answer to the examiner's questions about yourself, your opinions and experiences.

types.title: Part 2 – Long Turn
types.description: Analyze whether you have speculated about the photos or just described them, and improve your C1 vocabulary.

types.title: Part 3 – Collaborative Task
types.description: Evaluate whether you have managed the interaction correctly, inviting your partner to participate.

types.title: Part 4 – Discussion
types.description: Analyze the depth and sophistication of your answers in the discussion with the examiner.
